exercises.title: Read File
exercises.description: Read entire file with open() and with statement
exercises.code_template:
with open('data.txt', 'r') as file:
    # Your code
exercises.solution:
with open('data.txt', 'r') as file:
    content = file.read()
    print(content)

exercises.title: Write to File
exercises.code_template:
with open('output.txt', 'w') as file:
    # Your code

exercises.title: Path Operations
exercises.description: Get file extension from Path object
exercises.code_template:
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('document.txt')
# Get extension
exercises.solution:
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('document.txt')
print(path.suffix)

exercises.title: JSON File
exercises.code_template:
import json
with open('data.json', 'r') as f:
    # Your code
exercises.solution:
import json
with open('data.json', 'r') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
    print(data)
exercises.explanation: json.load() parses JSON from file into Python objects.
